trust_boundaries.name: Public Internet
trust_boundaries.description: Unauthenticated external users and attackers. No trust. All traffic arrives here first.
trust_boundaries.crossing_enforcement: None — CORS wildcard, no authentication required for many endpoints

trust_boundaries.name: Browser / Client Tier
trust_boundaries.description: Angular SPA running in browser. JWT stored in localStorage (XSS-accessible). Client-side route guards only — no server enforcement.
trust_boundaries.crossing_enforcement: JWT Bearer token in Authorization header (RS256, but private key hardcoded)

trust_boundaries.name: Application Tier
trust_boundaries.description: Express backend process. Handles all routing, authentication, and business logic. Partially enforces access control via express-jwt middleware on selected routes.
trust_boundaries.crossing_enforcement: No network-level isolation — same process; Sequelize ORM with raw SQL fallback

trust_boundaries.name: Data Tier
trust_boundaries.description: SQLite file (data/juiceshop.sqlite) and MarsDB in-memory store. No network isolation — same filesystem.
trust_boundaries.crossing_enforcement: File system permissions; no network segmentation; SQLite file accessible to any process running as same user

trust_boundaries.name: Filesystem / Upload Zone
trust_boundaries.description: Server filesystem including uploads/, ftp/, encryptionkeys/, logs/. Intended to be isolated but exposed via directory listing routes.
